item.message: Skill descriptions were shortened to fit the 2% skills context budget. Codex can still see every skill, but some descriptions are shorter. Disable unused skills or plugins to leave more room for the rest.

item.text: {"status":"continue","judgment":"partially-confirmed","observation":"The Still Guest has reached the blackout phase at 2.2m, with bearingRadians=-0.718 and audio pan=-0.457, placing it to the left. The flashlight is currently unavailable, so beam holding is not yet actionable.","trend":"Right turns previously reduced the positive bearing toward alignment, but the latest turn overshot into left-side alignment and triggered the full blackout scare.","reasoningSummary":"The encounter is active and the monster is now left of the player during blackout. A bounded left turn follows the current directional evidence and should prepare alignment before the flashlight returns; holding the beam now would be premature because flashlight intensity is zero.","evidence":["expedition.phase=exploring","activeEncounter.state=blackout","activeEncounter.distance=2.2","activeEncounter.bearingRadians=-0.7177112239235897","activeEncounter.audioCue.pan=-0.45690915599989385","activeEncounter.fullScareWitnessed=true","flashlight.mode=blackout","flashlight.intensity=0","activeEncounter.beamContact=false","activeEncounter.beamHoldMs=0","reportStatus=failed","luminance.readable=false"],"historyCallIds":["call-0004"],"nextActionProfile":"turn-left","nextHypothesis":"A bounded left turn during blackout should align the player with the Still Guest's current left-side position so hold-beam can be attempted immediately when the flashlight returns.","confidence":0.91,"stopReason":null}
